title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BUTONG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABUYAO, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 250 / 67 OG No. 35, 6866 (August 30, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6181, June 19, 1971 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF BUTONG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CABUYAO, PROVINCE OF LAGUNA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines

in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Butong in the Municipality of Cabuyao, Province of Laguna, is hereby converted into a distinct and independent barrio of said municipality, to be known as the Barrio of Butong.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1971.
